steps.title: Substitute to form a quadratic equation
steps.content:
Since $y = x^2$ and $x + y = 20$, substitute the parabola into the linear equation:
$$x + x^2 = 20$$
$$x^2 + x - 20 = 0$$

steps.title: Factor and identify the answer
steps.content: Factoring: $(x + 5)(x - 4) = 0$ gives $x = -5$ or $x = 4$. Only $x = 4$ appears among the choices. D is correct.
